_note: SP1.5 representative background denial. PID alone is never identity — the signed pid is alive but now hosts a different process (no matching proc-launch identity), so the action is denied before any native work. `code`/`reason` align to the SP1.5 vocabulary: background_code_for_reason(reason) == code. Display-safe only.
reason: desktop background control pid reused; whatsapp_send_message denied
